items.headline: The Iran Deal Comes at a Cost to Israel. The White House Hasn’t Acknowledged It.
items.quote_original: [REVIEW: paste the exact official quote here]
items.excerpt: The U.S.-Iran deal sidelines Israel, a critical ally, on issues affecting its core security interests. That may be tactically defensible, but the way Washington has handled it is not.
